final:
module shift_register(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire serial_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            data_out <= {data_out[0], serial_in}; // Shift left and input new data
        end
    end
endmodule
